category_sources: Official author homepage describes fcrackzip as a zip password cracker.
display_name_sources: Official author homepage and manpage use `fcrackzip`.
docs_sources: Official author homepage reproduces the fcrackzip manpage and availability notes.
repo_sources: Official author homepage provides source tarball downloads and contact/mailing-list information, but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: Official manpage documents brute-force and dictionary modes for encrypted ZIP files.
source_facts.description identifies a ZIP password cracker.
